python3 -c "
import json
with open('/Users/kunchen/.claude/projects/-Users-kunchen-github-kunchenguid-axi-bench-browser-results-chrome-devtools-mcp-wikipedia-link-follow-run3-workspace/072de632-95d6-4610-9582-171776b552fe/tool-results/mcp-chrome-devtools-take_snapshot-1775202331065.txt') as f:
    data = json.load(f)

text = data[0]['text'] if data else ''
# Find Charles Babbage links
import re
# Look for uid near 'Charles Babbage'
idx = text.find('Charles Babbage')
if idx >= 0:
    print(text[max(0,idx-200):idx+200])
"
